author: raoatifshad
body:
#### PR description:

This PR removes the unused static QieCalibMap cache from HcalPedestalAnalysis::per2CapsHists().

The static analyzer reports QieCalibMap as a potentially thread-unsafe static local variable. Looking at the code, qiecalib is created as an empty map, stored in QieCalibMap, and later retrieved, but the retrieved values are only referenced by commented-out code. The active charge calculation already uses HcalQIECoder::charge().

**Question for Hcal experts: does this QieCalibMap cache still serve any purpose, or is it safe to remove as dead code? If it is still needed, I can revise the PR.**
```src/CalibCalorimetry/HcalAlgos/src/HcalPedestalAnalysis.cc:253:3:
warning: function 'HcalPedestalAnalysis::per2CapsHists' accesses or modifies non-const static local variable 'QieCalibMap'. [cms.FunctionChecker]

src/CalibCalorimetry/HcalAlgos/src/HcalPedestalAnalysis.cc:253:3:
warning: Non-const variable 'map<HcalDetId, map<int, float> > QieCalibMap' is static local or static member data and might be thread-unsafe [threadsafety.StaticLocal]
```
title: [WarningFix]:unused static QieCalibMap cache from HcalPedestalAnalysi
